case_title: BAY AREA AUTOMOTIVE SERVICES, INC. DBA DISCOUNT BR VS KRAGEN AUTO SUPPLY CO.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY AREA AUTOMOTIVE SERVICES, INC. DBA DISCOUNT BR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KRAGEN AUTO SUPPLY CO. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,026.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL TO THE PRENTICE HALL CORP. AGENT- KRAGEN AUTO SUPPLY CO RETURNED SIGNED;
CHECKS OF $5026.00 AND $25.00 CHECK RETURNED TO CSK AUTO, INC WITH SC-145 FORM ENCLOSED;

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BAY AREA AUTOMOTIVE SERVICES, INC. DBA DISCOUNT BR AS TO DEFENDANT KRAGEN AUTO SUPPLY CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPY OF SATISFACTION AND INFO SENT TO DEF.CSK AUTO; CANNOT FILE MOVAC -RETURNED PAPERS WITH MO
DEF'S REQ.FOR MOTION TO VACATE; TO SUBMIT PROPER FEE OF $14.00;
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KRAGEN AUTO SUPPLY CO.
